action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate still 0.0 on all tasks after 200k steps/task (mean rewards far below bars e.g. reach~1.5k<<12k, walk~6<<700, package~-7k<<1500). Post-train evals and predict used raw obs (no VecNormalize) while training normalized obs → severe distribution mismatch, explaining poor eval rewards. Pipeline otherwise solid (per-task PPO, DummyVecEnv, VecNormalize saved, correct predict deterministic, 5-tuple API, no bad Monitor). Curves uninformative. Iter time ~2.2h. Analysis: Normalization fix in inference will reveal true policy performance; SubprocVecEnv+spawn will enable more steps (500k/task, n_envs=16, net=[512,512]) within time. Decision: Update train.py (add mp.spawn, SubprocVecEnv+vec_env_kwargs, larger net+steps, normalize_obs in evaluate using saved pkl) and predict.py (add normalize_obs using pickle-loaded obs_rms per-task, apply before every predict). This should boost mean_rewards significantly; submit_eval to get true baseline and ~2.5h iter time.
